summary: Iteration 58: Tested Smartflo IVR Click-to-Call integration and role-based Call Center Dashboard. All admin view features verified successfully. Click-to-Call buttons present on Customers (50 buttons), Quotations (12 buttons), and Call Center Dashboard (7 buttons). Admin view correctly shows Department Performance, Agent Performance, Recording column, Agent/Department columns, and hides Quick Dial button.

minor.issue: Console shows 404 errors for some resources (likely favicon or static assets) - not affecting functionality

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning)

critical_code_review_comments: Role-based logic correctly implemented: isCallSupport = user?.role === 'call_support' (line 37)
Call support agents use /smartflo/my-calls endpoint for their own calls only (line 55)
Department Performance and Agent Performance cards hidden for call_support via {!isCallSupport && ...} (line 259)
Agent and Department columns hidden for call_support (lines 358-359, 386-394)
Quick Dial button only shown for call_support (line 190-199)
Dashboard title changes based on role: 'My Calls Dashboard' vs 'Call Center Dashboard' (line 182)
ClickToCallButton component properly integrated in AdminCustomers.jsx (line 28, 416-420, 569-575)
ClickToCallButton component properly integrated in QuotationList.jsx (line 23, 433-439, 585-591)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 tested Smartflo IVR Click-to-Call integration. All features working correctly for admin view. Note: call_support role restrictions verified via code review only (no test user available). Key findings: 1) Click-to-Call buttons appear next to phone numbers in Customers, Quotations, and Call Center Dashboard. 2) Admin sees full dashboard with Department Performance, Agent Performance, Recording column, Agent/Department columns. 3) Quick Dial button correctly hidden for admin (only for call_support). 4) Click-to-Call dialog works correctly with phone number, customer name, and call instructions.

click_to_call_customers.details: 50 Click-to-Call buttons found on /admin/customers page next to phone numbers

click_to_call_quotations.details: 12 Click-to-Call buttons found on /quotations page next to customer phone numbers

click_to_call_calls_dashboard.details: 7 Click-to-Call buttons found in Call Center Dashboard call logs (Action column)

click_to_call_dialog.details: Dialog opens with phone number, customer name, call instructions, Cancel and Start Call buttons

admin_dashboard_title.details: Admin sees 'Call Center Dashboard' title (not 'My Calls Dashboard')

admin_department_performance.details: Department Performance card visible showing Customer Support and Sales departments

admin_agent_performance.details: Agent Performance card visible showing agents (Harleen, Jaspreet)

admin_recording_column.details: Recording column visible with play buttons for calls with recordings

admin_agent_column.details: Agent column visible in calls table

admin_department_column.details: Department column visible in calls table

admin_no_quick_dial.details: Quick Dial button NOT visible for admin (correct - only for call_support)

call_support_restrictions.details: No call_support test user available. Code review confirms: isCallSupport hides Dept/Agent Performance cards, Agent/Department columns, and shows Quick Dial button. canAccessRecordings hides Recording column for non-admin/supervisor.

isCallSupport_checks: Line 190: Quick Dial button shown only for call_support
Line 259: Department & Agent Performance cards hidden
canAccessRecordings_checks: Line 451: Recording dialog only for admin/supervisor
